a.xlink:title: Starts async request for analog inputs (CMD 0x3A, param1=1).
Starts async request for RC analog filter value (CMD 0x38).
Starts async command to set RC analog filter (CMD 0x39).
Starts async request to clear digital counters (CMD 0x1D).
Starts async request to get digital counter values (CMD 0xD8).
Asynchronously requests digital IO input values.
Asynchronously sets the digital IO values.
Combined Set and Get digital IO in one async call.
Starts the asynchronous encoder configuration retrieval.
Sets all pin configuration fields asynchronously.
Starts async request to get PoExtBus data (CMD 0xDA, param1=2).
Starts async request to set PoExtBus data (CMD 0xDA).
Starts async request to get PWM configuration (CMD 0xCB, param1=0)
Starts async command to configure PWM duty cycle and period (CMD 0xCB).
Starts async command to update PWM values only (CMD 0xCB, param1=1, param2=1).
Starts an asynchronous RTC read from the device.
Starts async pin function configuration request (CMD 0xC0, param1=0).
